customChange.param: Register and manage own business listings via member portal
Approve or reject member-submitted business listings
Hide or restore business listings in the federation directory

changeSet.author: mosque-crm
changeSet.comment: Backfill phase-2 federation permissions to ADMIN and MEMBER templates/roles

changeSet.author: mosque-crm
changeSet.comment: Seed public_events share settings for existing active partnerships
changeSet.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO organization_share_settings (partnership_id, module_key, enabled, share_level, created_at, updated_at) SELECT p.id, 'public_events', false, 'PARENT_ONLY', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM organization_partnerships p WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM organization_share_settings s WHERE s.partnership_id = p.id AND s.module_key = 'public_events' );
